title: Команды
emptyDescription: Create your first team to get started.

delete.title: Удалить команду
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

detail.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? All members, tasks, and configuration will be permanently removed.

members.title: Участники
members.addMemberTooltip: Only predefined agents can be added as team members. Open agents are per-user and lack shared context needed for team collaboration.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.noTasksDescription: Tasks are created by team agents during collaboration.
tasks.deleteConfirm: Delete this task? This cannot be undone.
tasks.deleteBulkConfirm: This will permanently delete {{count}} task(s). Type "delete" to confirm.

delegations.noDescription: No delegation records found for this team.

workspace.title: Рабочая область
workspace.noFilesDescription: Files are created by team agents during collaboration.

upload.title: Upload to Workspace
upload.description: Upload files for agents to read during collaboration

workspace.crossScopeMoveError: Cannot move files between different scopes

settings.title: Team Settings
settings.name: Имя
settings.allowedUsersHint: If set, only these users can trigger team workflows. Empty = all allowed.
settings.allowedChannelsHint: If set, only these channels can activate team workflows. Empty = all allowed.
settings.deniedChannelsHint: Messages from these channels are always blocked.
settings.notifyDispatchedHint: Notify when a task is assigned to a team member.
settings.notifyProgressHint: Notify when a member updates task progress.
settings.notifySlowToolHint: System alert when a tool call takes abnormally long. Always direct — never through leader.
settings.notifyModeHint: How notifications are delivered to the chat channel.
settings.notifyModeDirectDesc: Send notifications straight to the chat channel. Fast, no AI processing.
settings.notifyModeLeaderDesc: Leader agent reformulates updates naturally before sending to user.
settings.notifyModeLeaderWarning: Leader mode uses AI to reformulate messages (costs tokens, may be slower).
settings.memberRequestsEnabledDesc: Members can create request tasks to ask for help from other teammates
settings.memberRequestsAutoDispatchDesc: Requests are dispatched immediately; otherwise they stay pending for leader review
settings.escalationModeHint: Controls how privileged workspace actions (pin, tag, delete others' files, set_template) are handled when requested by agents.
settings.blockerEscalationHint: When members flag a blocker, the task auto-fails and the leader is notified to retry with updated instructions.
settings.escalationModeAutoDesc: LLM lead evaluates the request — either rejects or creates a review task. Never executes directly.
settings.escalationModeReviewDesc: Always creates a pending task for human approval. No auto-reject.
settings.escalationModeRejectDesc: Rejects all privileged action requests outright. Lockdown mode.
settings.escalationModeNoneDesc: No escalation policy. Lead agent executes actions directly.
settings.escalationActionsHint: Select which workspace actions require escalation. If none selected, all privileged actions are subject to escalation.
settings.followupIntervalHint: How long to wait before sending each follow-up reminder to the user.
settings.followupMaxRemindersHint: Maximum number of reminders per task. 0 = unlimited (remind until user replies).
settings.workspaceScopeHint: Control how team workspace files are organized.
settings.workspaceScopeIsolatedDesc: Each conversation has its own workspace folder. Files from one chat are not visible in another.
settings.workspaceScopeSharedDesc: All conversations share a single workspace folder. Files created in any chat are visible to all.
settings.versionAdvancedDesc: All V1 features plus execution locking, follow-up reminders, review workflow, progress tracking, comments, audit trail, and auto-recovery.

versionModal.title: Super Team Features
versionModal.followupRemindersDesc: Auto-remind when waiting for user reply
versionModal.reviewWorkflowDesc: Submit for human review before completing
versionModal.commentsAuditDesc: Task comments and full event history
versionModal.escalationPolicyDesc: Members can flag blockers — auto-fails task and notifies leader to retry
versionModal.downgradeNote: Downgrade is safe — V2 data is preserved but hidden.
versionModal.betaNote: Some features are currently in Beta.

create.title: Создать команду
create.name: Name *
create.noActiveAgents: No active agents found. Create agents first.
create.membersTooltip: Only predefined agents can be added as team members. Open agents are per-user and lack shared context needed for team collaboration.
create.needMembers: Select at least 1 member for the team

rename.staleError: Team was updated elsewhere — your change was discarded

board.createViaChat: Chat with the team agent to create tasks

links.title: Agent Links
links.confirmDelete: Delete this agent link? This cannot be undone.
links.sameAgentError: Source and target must be different agents.
